title: lagenantha gillettii
intro: Lagenantha gillettii, also known as the 'thorny spurge', is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lagenantha gillettii include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and fever reduction. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
